headline: Public Storage: National Storage Deal Adds Upside, But Iran Risks Keep It A Hold
summary: Public Storage rated Hold as macro and Iran risks cloud near-term outlook; $10.5B NSA deal supports long-term synergies. Click for this PSA stock update.

headline: Public Storage flat after solid but cautious quarter
summary: The American self-storage specialist posted Q1 results that are slightly ahead of expectations, although its decision to maintain its full-year guidance dampened investor enthusiasm.
